title: Campylochnella arenaria

The genus Campylochnella is part of the family Cunoniaceae, which includes other Australian flowering plants. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and infections.
